results.rendered_html:
pra-√duṣ P. -duṣyati, to become worse, deteriorate,  Suśr. ;
to be defiled or polluted, fall (morally),  Mn. ;  Yājñ. ;
to commit an offence against (acc.),  MBh. ;
to become faithless, fall off,  ib.  :
Caus. -dūṣayati, to spoil, deprave, corrupt, pollute, defile,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
to abuse, blame, censure,  R. ;
(with cittam) to be angry,  Divyāv.

results.rendered_html:
praduṣ 4 P.
1 To grow worse, deteriorate.
2 To be corrupted or spoiled, be vitiated;  Y. 3. 19. 
3 To sin, err, commit an offence against, be faithless or unchaste;  Bg. 1. 41 ;  Ms. 9. 74 ;  Pt. 4. 57. 
— Caus.
1 (a) To spoil, corrupt, soil, taint. (b) To pollute, contaminate, defile.
2 To blame, censure, find fault with.
